basic_details.job_title: CCRAS NARIP Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: National Ayurveda Research Institute for Panchakarma (CCRAS NARIP)
basic_details.short_information: National Ayurveda Research Institute for Panchakarma (CCRAS NARIP) Junior Research Fellow (Pharmacy) Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on 18 June 2026 on the official website of CCRAS. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CCRAS NARIP Junior Research Fellow (Pharmacy) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Relaxation in the upper age limit is applicable for SC/ST/OBC candidates as per Government of India orders.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor of Pharmacy/Pharmaceuticals, Master of Pharmacy/Pharmaceuticals, 2 years working experience in Pharmacy/Research, Working knowledge of computer application
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (Pharmacy): Bachelor of Pharmacy/Pharmaceuticals (Essential); Master of Pharmacy/Pharmaceuticals, 2 years working experience in Pharmacy/Research, Working knowledge of computer application (Desirable)

all_official_links.label: Download CCRAS NARIP Junior Research Fellow (Pharmacy) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CCRAS NARIP Junior Research Fellow (Pharmacy) recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to appear for the interview on the scheduled date, which is 29-06-2026. There is no prior online application process.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow (Pharmacy) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000/- plus HRA.

faq.question: Q3. What are the essential qualifications required for the Junior Research Fellow (Pharmacy) position?
faq.answer: The essential qualification is a Bachelor of Pharmacy/Pharmaceuticals. A Master of Pharmacy/Pharmaceuticals, along with 2 years of working experience in Pharmacy/Research and computer application knowledge, is desirable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow (Pharmacy) post is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC candidates as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow (Pharmacy) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow (Pharmacy) position.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow (Pharmacy) post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the National Ayurveda Research Institute for Panchakarma located?
faq.answer: The institute is located in Cheruthuruthy, Kerala, with the pincode 679531.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q10. Is there any online application process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, this recruitment is being conducted through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates do not need to apply online beforehand.
